nasb.text: That which has been is that which will be, And that which has been done is that which will be done. So there is nothing new under the sun.

esv.text: What has been is what will be, and what has been done is what will be done, and there is nothing new under the sun.

cnv.text: 已有的事必再有， 作過的事必再作； 日光之下並無新事。

ccb.text: 以往发生的事，将来还会发生； 先前做过的事，将来也必再做。 日光之下，根本没有新事。

csbs.text: 已有的事，将来还会有； 做过的事，将来还会做； 日光之下没有任何新事。
